title: clinical-genomics-platform pipeline parameters
description: Germline SNV pipeline benchmarked against GIAB truth sets (GIAB HG002/NA24385, GRCh38 chr20).

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Path to comma-separated sample sheet with columns 'sample,fastq_1,fastq_2'.
input.help_text: Each row is one sample; paired-end FASTQ paths must exist and be readable.

outdir.description: The output directory where results, provenance reports and pipeline_info are saved.

reference_genome_options.title: Reference genome options
reference_genome_options.description: Reference genome used for alignment and calling.

reference.description: Path to the reference FASTA (GRCh38 chr20 subset for the default scope).

reference_build.description: Human-readable reference build label recorded in the provenance stamp.

truth_set_options.title: Truth set options
truth_set_options.description: GIAB high-confidence truth set used for analytical validation with hap.py.

truth_bed.description: GIAB high-confidence regions BED restricting the benchmark.

truth_version.description: Truth-set version label recorded in the provenance stamp.

pipeline_behaviour_options.title: Pipeline behaviour options
pipeline_behaviour_options.description: Control which caller runs and whether results are written to Postgres.

db_ingest.description: Write the provenance-stamped metrics to the insert-only Postgres store.

db_url.description: Postgres connection URL used when db_ingest is enabled. Defaults to the CGP_DB_URL environment variable.

intervals.description: Genomic interval string restricting calling/benchmarking (e.g. chr20:1000000-2000000).

max_resource_options.title: Max resource options
max_resource_options.description: Ceilings applied to per-process resource requests (enforced via process.resourceLimits).
max_resource_options.help_text: Requests scale on retry and are clamped to these values by resourceLimits.

max_cpus.description: Maximum number of CPUs any single task may use.

max_memory.description: Maximum memory any single task may use (e.g. '16.GB').

max_time.description: Maximum wall-clock time any single task may run (e.g. '8.h').
